indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: Natural light
indicators.rationale: Natural light can reduce eye strain and improve mood.

indicators.name: Couch
indicators.rationale: A couch can provide a comfortable place to sit while working.

indicators.name: Table
indicators.rationale: A table can be used to place a computer and other work materials.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work (Solo) due to its large open area, natural lighting, and the presence of a couch and table.
